diff:
diff --git a/MainProjects/Algebraic-Jacobian-Challenge/blueprint/src/chapters/Picard_QuotScheme.tex b/MainProjects/Algebraic-Jacobian-Challenge/blueprint/src/chapters/Picard_QuotScheme.tex
index 8a8758f..ecb53e2 100644
--- a/MainProjects/Algebraic-Jacobian-Challenge/blueprint/src/chapters/Picard_QuotScheme.tex
+++ b/MainProjects/Algebraic-Jacobian-Challenge/blueprint/src/chapters/Picard_QuotScheme.tex
@@ -5002,9 +5002,8 @@ adjunction on the affine model.
   Transpose \(\pi'\) through the adjunction
   \(\widetilde{(\cdot)} \dashv \Gamma\): writing
   \(t : R^{\oplus I} \to \Gamma(\widetilde N)\) for the transpose,
-  the counit factorization gives
-  \(\pi' = \widetilde{t} \circ \varepsilon_{\widetilde N}^{-1}\)-conjugate,
-  more precisely \(\widetilde{t} \mathbin{;} \varepsilon_{\widetilde N} = \pi'\).
+  the counit factorization reads
+  \(\widetilde{t} \mathbin{;} \varepsilon_{\widetilde N} = \pi'\).
   The counit \(\varepsilon\) of the tilde--\(\Gamma\) adjunction is invertible
   at every tilde: the triangle identity
   \(\widetilde{\eta_N} \mathbin{;} \varepsilon_{\widetilde N} = \mathrm{id}\)
